global.description: The ad features a vibrant green background with a game interface and promotional text.
global.main_message: Encourages users to install the game with a promotional offer.

elements.label: Green background
elements.description: A vibrant green background fills the canvas, providing a lively and energetic feel.

elements.label: Game interface
elements.description: A screenshot of a game interface featuring circular elements and a play button, showcasing gameplay.

elements.label: Game elements
elements.description: Circular game elements displayed prominently, indicating interactive features of the app.

elements.label: Game title
elements.description: The title 'NeonArena' is displayed in a bold, modern font at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Main call to action
elements.description: The main call to action text 'Beat your rivals No ads in first week' is bold and prominent at the bottom.
elements.text_content: Beat your rivals No ads in first week

elements.label: Secondary call to action
elements.description: A smaller call to action text 'Install now' is positioned below the main message, encouraging immediate action.

elements.label: Game logo
elements.description: The logo 'NeonArena' is displayed prominently at the top, representing the game brand.

elements.label: Bonus offer
elements.description: A bright yellow badge labeled 'BONUS' is positioned at the top right, indicating a special offer.
